footer_config.text: FDA Form 1571 - Investigational New Drug Application (IND)

sections.title: 3. NAME(S) OF DRUG (Include all available names)
5. INDICATION(S)
sections.llm_prompt: List the indication(s) covered by this IND submission for {product_name}. Be specific about disease, stage, prior therapy requirements, and any population restrictions.

sections.title: 6. PHASE(S) OF CLINICAL INVESTIGATION TO BE CONDUCTED

rows.label: Note
rows.value: Serial number 0000 is reserved for original IND submission

items.text: IND Safety Report(s): Initial Written Report
IND Safety Report(s): Follow-up to a Written Report

sections.title: 9. JUSTIFICATION FOR SUBMISSION (If applicable)
sections.llm_prompt: Write a brief justification for this IND submission for {product_name}. Summarize the rationale for clinical investigation, unmet medical need, preclinical support for first-in-human study, and fit within any applicable expedited programs (Breakthrough, Fast Track, RMAT, Orphan).

sections.title: 10. LIST OF DOCUMENTS SUBMITTED (eCTD Table of Contents)
sections.llm_prompt: Generate the eCTD Table of Contents for an initial IND submission for {product_name}. Organize by Module: Module 1 (Administrative - cover letter, Form 1571, Form 1572, financial disclosure, environmental assessment, Letters of Authorization), Module 2 (Common Technical Document summaries), Module 3 (Quality - drug substance 3.2.S, drug product 3.2.P), Module 4 (Nonclinical Study Reports), Module 5 (Clinical Study Reports and protocol).

items.text: A Phase 1 study will not begin until 30 days after FDA receives the IND unless FDA authorizes earlier
An IRB will review and approve each study in the IND before study initiation
I agree to conduct investigation in accordance with all applicable regulatory requirements
I agree to notify FDA of any serious unexpected adverse reactions per 21 CFR 312.32
I agree to submit annual reports per 21 CFR 312.33
I understand failure to comply may result in termination of the investigation

sections.title: 12. NAME AND TITLE OF PERSON RESPONSIBLE FOR MONITORING

approvers.role: Medical Officer Responsible for Review (Name and Title)

metadata.note: This template mirrors the information required on FDA Form 1571. Sponsors must submit the actual FDA form as part of the IND application.
